issues.title: No way to compare crime density across districts
issues.description: The choropleth map shows crime counts by district, but there is no way to compare crime density (per capita or per area). A journalist needs this for comparison stories.
issues.expected: Toggle between raw count and per-capita rate
issues.actual: Only raw count; no per-capita option

issues.title: No hotspot clustering visualization
issues.description: The cluster map shows individual crime points, but there is no heatmap or hotspot visualization showing concentration areas.
issues.expected: Heatmap overlay showing crime concentration areas
issues.actual: Individual dots only; no density visualization

summary: Locations page shows geographic data but lacks density metrics and hotspot visualization needed for comparison stories.
